candidates.why: Represents the company’s total top-line revenues; primary revenue line and matches definition of REVT.
Finance income is not operating revenue; it is financial income, so not appropriate for total revenues.
Interest income is financial income, not operating revenue from core activities.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities is an equity flow, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income is a bottom-line measure including many components, not top-line revenue.
Explicit COGS line capturing direct cost of goods and services; best match for cost of sales.
Labeled as personnel expenses, which are more consistent with operating overhead (SG&A) than direct COGS for this mapping.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly SG&A-related stock-based compensation, not COGS.
General operating/overhead costs; broader than direct cost of goods and not pure COGS.
Financial item, not cost of sales.
Result from discontinued operations, not current period COGS.
Lease-related operating cost but not necessarily direct COGS; also not the primary COGS line.
Supplemental disclosure of labor costs, more akin to overhead than explicit COGS line.
Personnel costs are classic SG&A overhead; not labeled as COGS and fits operating overhead definition.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation component; should be included as SG&A component.
Generic operating expenses that are not COGS or D&A; appropriate SG&A bucket.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D, not the current-period R&D expense itself; using this would misstate XRD as it is a depreciation-type component.
Balance sheet asset, not a period expense; not suitable for XRD which should be an income statement expense.
Gross carrying amount of R&D intangible assets, not an expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization/impairment balance, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: No explicit research & development expense line is present in the income statement; available R&D-related rows are amortization or balance sheet items, which do not represent current-period R&D expense. XRD is therefore treated as 0.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line for borrowing costs; best measure of finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; also part of interest expense and should be available as secondary priority.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; can serve as another possible interest expense line if others are missing.
Interest income is opposite sign (income, not expense) and should not be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing item used to force internal consistency; not a primary reporting line and should be avoided unless others are missing.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities is an equity allocation, unrelated to interest costs.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income total, not a finance cost line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense labels are provided as a priority list; later processing will select the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Equity attributable to shareholders; excludes any separate non-controlling interests (none are present), making it the correct book equity measure.
Equals shareholders equity in this statement and appears to include no separate minority interest; redundant but less specific than shareholders equity.
Technical balancing line, not an economic equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing construct for the statement; not a pure equity figure.
Sum of equity and liabilities, not equity alone.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: This is a flow measure (comprehensive income attributable to minorities), not the balance sheet stock of minority interests required for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income before allocating to minorities, not a minority interest equity balance.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for non-controlling/minority interests is present; total equity equals shareholders equity, indicating no separate minority equity. MIB is therefore set to 0.
